summary: Regression smoke after adding /app/backend/main.py shim, Procfile, and nixpacks.toml for Railway deploy. No impact on running preview. All targeted backend endpoints and frontend flows pass. Shim import verified.
passed: Python shim import: `from main import app` returns FastAPI app (title 'TaskFlow API')
GET /api/admin/dashboard -> 200, totals={tasks:9, employees:5, completed:4, hours_logged:11.0}, per_user populated
Frontend /login -> admin login redirects to /admin; Team Overview KPIs render (5/9/4/11.0) and Recharts (Workload by employee, Status breakdown) display
Frontend /login -> maya@taskflow.com employee login redirects to /tasks; Kanban renders three columns TO DO (0), IN PROGRESS (3), DONE (2) with task cards
notes: Recharts console warnings about width(-1)/height(-1) appear momentarily during chart mount on the admin dashboard but charts render correctly after layout settles; non-blocking cosmetic warning, not a regression. Deployment files (main.py shim, Procfile, nixpacks.toml) are not loaded by supervisor; preview backend continues to run server:app and is unaffected.
